message:
feat(algorithms): refactor degree lookups, add directed node_disjoint_paths, and release GIL in pagerank

- Replace manual neighbors_iter().count() with graph.degree() calls across
  core_number, average_neighbor_degree, degree_assortativity_coefficient,
  min_edge_cover, is_eulerian, has_eulerian_path, and eulerian path/circuit
- Add node_disjoint_paths_directed() for digraph support
- Release the Python GIL during pagerank computation via py.allow_threads()
- Dispatch node_disjoint_paths through the directed variant when the graph is directed

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
